data.title: The Many Acquires Majority Stake in Immersive Technology Studio CatalystXR, Expanding Global Participation Capabilities
data.description: In Los Angeles, The Many, an independent agency renowned for developing engagement-centered brands, has revealed the purchase of a controlling interest in CatalystXR, an Australian immersive technology firm dedicated to XR, VR, AR, and extensive interactive settings. As part of the deal, CatalystXR's founder, Jamie Gilroy, will assume the role of Partner overseeing Participatory Technology at The Many. This move signifies a significant step in The Many's worldwide growth, solidifying its presence across offices in various locations.

data.title: Traction Uranium Engages Market Maker
data.description: Traction Uranium Corp. has chosen Independent Trading Group, Inc. as the market maker for its common shares on the Canadian Securities Exchange. The company's stock, listed as CSE: TRAC, OTC: TRCTF, and FRA: Z1K, will now be managed by ITG, located at 420, 33 Yonge Street, Toronto, ON, Canada, M5E 1G4, with contact person Chris Kaplan reachable via chriskaplan@itg84.com.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces Results for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on April 20, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP), known as GAP, released its unaudited consolidated results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026 (1Q26), based on International Financial Reporting Standards from the International Accounting Standards Board. The figures provided do not include the recent business combination approved on December 11, 2025, involving the integration of Cross Border Xpress (CBX) and internalization of technical assistance services from AMP. The definitive agreements pertaining to this transaction have not been finalized, and closing the deal is contingent upon meeting standard closing conditions.

data.title: Raytech Holding Limited Announces Strategic Expansion into Personal Health Care Electronics Services; Strengthens Leadership by Appointing Mr. Haoyuan Liu as Chairman and Executive Director
data.description: Hong Kong, April 20, 2026 - Raytech Holding Limited (NASDAQ: RAY) disclosed its shift in focus towards personal health care electronics services, encompassing product design, development, and consultations. This strategic pivot commenced in the third quarter of its financial year ending March 31, 2026. Raytech Holding Limited, also known as RAY, aims to leverage its expertise in this area for growth.

data.title: Mizuho Securities Adopts Behavox to Establish AI-Powered Communications Monitoring Framework
data.description: In Tokyo, Behavox, an AI company specializing in enhancing business operations through unified controls, revealed that Mizuho Securities, a major player in Japan's investment banking sector, has integrated Behavox Quantum AI for communication surveillance. The successful implementation by Mizuho Securities, part of the Mizuho Financial Group, highlights their commitment to robust risk management. The technology ensures complete traceability throughout the investigation process, fortifying compliance efforts.

data.title: Remi Preemptively Deploys Programmable Compliance Architecture, Fully Aligned with HKMA's Latest Stablecoin Licensing Standards
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Singapore, a significant development has taken place in the stablecoin industry, with programmable compliance emerging as a key regulatory standard worldwide. Hong Kong's recent issuance of its inaugural stablecoin licenses has added credibility to this innovative approach in the industry. This move underscores the increasing recognition of the importance of regulatory frameworks in ensuring stability and trust within the stablecoin sector. The milestone achieved by Hong Kong serves as an indication of the industry's shift towards embracing new technological solutions to enhance compliance and operational efficiency. This development marks a turning point in the industry's evolution, emphasizing the critical role of regulatory adherence and technological advancements in shaping the future landscape of stablecoins.

data.title: Oriental Rise Receives Nasdaq Staff Delisting Determination
data.description: On April 20, 2026 in NINGDE, China, Oriental Rise Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: ORIS) disclosed that it has been notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC of its decision to delist the Company's ordinary shares from The Nasdaq Capital Market. The notification, received on April 15, 2026, came in the form of a staff determination letter from Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department. Oriental Rise Holdings Limited, a major tea supplier in mainland China, has seen its shares face delisting from Nasdaq.

data.title: WHIRLPOOL CORPORATION TO ANNOUNCE FIRST-QUARTER RESULTS ON MAY 6TH AND HOLD CONFERENCE CALL ON MAY 7TH
data.description: The multinational company Whirlpool Corporation (NYSE: WHR) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6th at 4:05 p.m. ET. A conference call will be held to analyze their performance shortly after the release of the materials.

data.title: King Street Announces New Leadership Structure
data.description: Global alternative investment firm King Street Capital Management, established in 1995, revealed a revised leadership structure on April 20, 2026. With $30 billion in assets under management, the firm is prominent in the industry. The updated leadership strategy aims to provide clearer direction and oversight for the organization's operations going forward.

data.title: Hozpitality Group Announces Los Angeles Hospitality Leadership Forum 2026, Featuring Top Industry Leaders and Timely Panel Discussions
data.description: An exclusive forum will gather CEOs, General Managers, and HR leaders in Downtown LA for vital discussions on profitability and the outlook for the hospitality industry. The event, hosted by Hozpitality Group, is set to take place in Los Angeles on April 20, 2026. Leaders from various sectors will be invited, with a focus on high-impact dialogues regarding the future landscape of the industry.

data.title: Q2 Metals Announces Inferred Mineral Resource Estimate on the Cisco Lithium Project with 295 Million Tonnes Grading 1.36% Li₂O
data.description: Q2 Metals has revealed the inferred mineral resource estimate for the Cisco Lithium Project, indicating a substantial 295 million tonnes with a grade of 1.36% Li2O.

data.title: OSRX Teams Up with Pro Rodeo Standout Sam Petersen Following Breakout 2025 Season
data.description: OSRX has announced its partnership with professional rodeo sensation Sam Petersen to enhance the Ride with OSRX initiative in Missoula, Montana. This collaboration aims to emphasize precision, performance, and advancement in ophthalmic compounding. The initiative showcases the values of accuracy and growth in this field and is set to make a significant impact on the local community.
